name: DSG AI-Firstify Plugin
description: AI-Firstify governance and customization plugin for DSG platform. Provides governance gates, policy enforcement, and compliance tracking for AI-first operations.
shortDescription: AI governance and compliance for AI-first operations
author: DSG Platform

capabilities.title: AI Model Governance
capabilities.description: Real-time governance gates for AI model deployment and execution

capabilities.title: Policy Enforcement
capabilities.description: Enforce policies and compliance rules for AI operations

capabilities.title: Audit Trail
capabilities.description: Complete audit trail for all AI operations and decisions

capabilities.title: Custom Rules
capabilities.description: Create and manage custom governance rules for your AI workflows

permissions.name: AI Model Access
permissions.description: Access and monitor AI model execution

permissions.name: Audit Logging
permissions.description: Log AI operations for compliance and auditing
